Class DefaultParameters

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.repository.query.Parameters<DefaultParameters, Parameter>
org.springframework.data.repository.query.DefaultParameters
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<Parameter>, Supplier<Stream<Parameter>>, Streamable<Parameter>
public final class DefaultParameters extends Parameters<DefaultParameters, Parameter>
Default implementation of Parameters.
